allow: Bash(sed -i '' 's/\(data ?? \\[\\]\) as ServiceReport\\[\\]/\(data ?? []\) as unknown as ServiceReport[]/g' src/components/owner/OwnerDashboard.tsx src/components/technician/TechnicianReports.tsx)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/data as ServiceReport/data as unknown as ServiceReport/g' src/components/owner/ReportDetail.tsx)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/photos as Record<string, string\\[\\]>/photos as unknown as Record<string, string[]>/g' src/components/owner/OwnerDashboard.tsx src/components/technician/TechnicianReports.tsx)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/const PRIMARY = \\[37, 99, 235\\];/const PRIMARY: [number, number, number] = [37, 99, 235];/' src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts)
Bash(sed -i '' 's/const SUCCESS = \\[16, 185, 129\\]/const SUCCESS: [number, number, number] = [16, 185, 129]/' src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts)
